onald O. Pederson Center, 5th Floor, Cory Hall The BEARS Center for Hybrid and Embedded Software Systems (CHESS) Open House will be held on Thursday, February 12, 2009, from 2:00-5:00 pm in the the open forum of the Donald O. Pederson Cente

e the open forum of the Donald O. Pederson Center on the 5th floor of Cory. CHESS funded students and postdoctoral scholars must prepare a poster for the poster session. Other students and postdoctoral scholars who are associated with CHESS should

ral scholars who are associated with CHESS should prepare a poster. Register your poster with title and abstract As a template use either the CHESS Poster Template or the Alternative CHESS Poster Template Print your poster. See How do I print a post
